# GitHub Instructions

## Documentation
- Use Context7 to fetch the latest documentation for any library or framework before implementing or configuring it.

## Code Style
- Do not add comments to code unless explicitly requested.
- Avoid single-letter variable names. Use descriptive names instead.
- Do not use inline styles. Use Tailwind CSS only.

## Project Structure
- Each React component must live in its own file.
- Keep all type definitions inside the `types` folder.
- Store shared exported constants inside the `constants` folder.

## Development Workflow
- You can use the VS Code integrated browser for testing and debugging when needed.

## Engineering Principles
- Follow SOLID, DRY, KISS, and YAGNI principles.
- Prefer clean, readable, maintainable code.
